title: phenax hirtus
intro: Phenax hirtus, also known as the hairy fen or hairy gentian, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its bitter compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Phenax hirtus include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
